data.title: Iovate to showcase MuscleTech® at Olympia Fitness Weekend, expanding products nationwide. TORONTO, Oct. 9, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Leading the way in its industry, MuscleTech® is set to roll out an expanded range of products across the country. On October 9, 2025, Iovate Health Sciences International Inc. unveiled this venture, revealing that MuscleTech® will now be accessible nationwide. This move showcases the brand's dedication to innovation and category dominance.

data.title: Dow drops 300 points, gold miners hit hard with silver down 3%. Nvidia increases with Taiwan Semi's strong sales.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average and other key stock market indexes experienced a decline. Notably, Nvidia saw an increase in its stock value following the robust September sales reported by its supplier, Taiwan Semiconductor. The Dow plummeted by 300 points during the day's trading. Additionally, gold mining companies faced significant losses as the price of silver dropped by 3%.

data.title: Factor4 launches customizable self-serve kiosk for scalable gift card solutions at events, reaching major industries.
data.description: A recent partnership has led to the creation of a user-friendly kiosk that simplifies the process of buying gift cards and checking balances for various industries such as events, hospitality, retail, and food service. This development was revealed in BROOMALL, Pa., on Oct. 9, 2025. Factor4 has successfully integrated its services with a self-service kiosk platform, offering a streamlined and easily expandable solution for businesses looking to enhance their gift card services.

data.title: Polymarket founder becomes world's youngest self-made billionaire with $2B investment, valuing company at $8B.
data.description: Polymarket, a popular prediction market, has made significant waves in the sports betting industry with its disruptive technology. Recently, the company received a substantial investment of $2 billion from Intercontinental Exchange Inc (NYSE: ICE), the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange. This investment has propelled the company's valuation to $8 billion, turning its founder, Shayne Coplan, into the world's youngest self-made billionaire at the age of 27. Coplan, a dropout from New York University, embarked on his journey to create Polymarket in 2019, drawing inspiration from economist Robin Hanson's ideas on prediction markets. After establishing the company in June 2020, Coplan took to social media to reflect on the significant growth and achievements Polymarket has attained over the years. Utilizing cryptocurrency, Polymarket allows consumers to participate in various prediction activities such as wagering on presidential elections and sports events. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics is offering $4.5M placements for 2.25M shares at $2/share and Series F warrants for 4.5M shares.
data.description: ACTON, Mass., Oct. 09, 2025 - Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX), a company specializing in medical diagnostics for critical care, has finalized agreements for the sale of 2,250,000 common stock shares at $2.00 per share, totaling $4,500,000, along with Series F warrants enabling the purchase of up to 4,500,000 shares. The Series F warrants, priced at $1.75 per share, can be exercised immediately after issuance and will expire 5.5 years from the issue date. The private placement, set to close around October 10, 2025, is subject to customary closing conditions.

data.title: ETH prices dip with BTC, but strong adoption pushes rally to $10K. On-chain activity sees 9.5B daily contract calls, $11.7B locked in tokenized real assets - shaping Ether's future.
data.description: The daily contract calls on the Ethereum blockchain have exceeded 9.5 billion, showcasing a significant on-chain activity. Moreover, the total value locked in tokenized real-world assets has surged to $11.7 billion. Given these figures, the question arises whether the price of Ether will mirror this trend.

data.title: Beacon Education partners with Belhaven University to offer online degrees in China, largest provider, Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: A diverse range of online degrees is set to be introduced by Beacon Education on October 9, 2025, as reported. Beacon Education, a leading provider of online graduate degrees in China, has unveiled its latest partnership with Belhaven University. This collaboration brings forth an inventive array of graduate programs to cater to a wide audience.

data.title: CIA's 27th annual event to showcase Mediterranean cuisine at Napa in Nov. Bringing experts globally.
data.description: Esteemed chefs from various regions including Europe, the Levant, and the United States will showcase their culinary expertise at Napa this November. The Culinary Institute of America (CIA) will host the 27th annual event, bringing together top influencers in Mediterranean cuisine and culture. Scheduled for November, participants will have the opportunity to learn from the best minds in the industry, further enriching their culinary knowledge. With attendance expected from across the globe, this promises to be a truly remarkable event for food enthusiasts and professionals alike.

data.title: 1,000 DOGE bought a year ago is now up over 120%, with a $1,000 investment in Dogecoin on Oct. 10, 2024, worth $2,270.62. Market cap near $37 billion.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has surged by 122.7% over the past year, driven by positive sentiment surrounding the newly introduced DOJE ETF and the increasing adoption of the token by corporate treasuries. A $1,000 investment made on October 10, 2024, would have bought 9,267.84 DOGE, now valued at $2,270.62 at the current price of $0.2450, more than doubling in worth. Although it may not replicate the remarkable returns from its inception, Dogecoin's resilience has defied critics' expectations. Despite concerns over its limited practicality, Dogecoin maintains its dominance in the meme coin sector with a market cap approaching $37 billion.

data.title: Kontron partners with EIZO Rugged Solutions to enhance VPX portfolio with CPU/GPU platforms for mission-critical applications.
data.description: Kontron, a prominent IoT/Embedded Computer Technology provider, has revealed a key partnership with EIZO Rugged Solutions Inc., specializing in ruggedized embedded graphics processing and video solutions. This strategic collaboration will see Kontron enhancing its VPX portfolio with EIZO’s GPU technology, featuring NVIDIA® GPU chipsets. System integrators can now leverage fully validated CPU/GPU platforms tailored for rigorous missions.

data.title: 24 Seven acquires Futureman and MTP, marking its 10th and 11th acquisitions to boost its creative agency and talent solutions.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, 24 Seven, a major privately owned marketing, creative, and digital talent solutions company, revealed the completion of its 10th and 11th acquisitions. These strategic acquisitions are poised to significantly enhance the company's creative agency and talent solutions capabilities. This move consolidates 24 Seven's position as one of the nation's leading firms in this sector.

data.title: West-MEC in Peoria, Arizona is helping power the workforce for growth in the West Valley, partnering with major employers like Amkor, Nestlé, and Amazon in metro Phoenix.
data.description: In Peoria, Arizona, on October 9, 2025, it was highlighted that a competent workforce plays a crucial role in the economic growth of rapidly developing areas like the West Valley in Arizona. Companies like Amkor, Nestlé, and Amazon are among the key employers contributing to the expansion of operations in the metro Phoenix area. This emphasizes the importance of skilled labor in supporting the economy.

data.title: New report by The Beryl Institute on AI in healthcare emphasizes balance between technology and human touch.
data.description: A recently published report by The Beryl Institute in Nashville, Tennessee, on October 9, 2025, addresses the potential and hurdles in integrating AI into healthcare while preserving the personal aspect. The paper, "Defining and Advancing the Use of AI in Healthcare Experience," explores strategies to leverage AI effectively. This research provides insights into balancing technological advancements with maintaining a human-centric approach.

data.title: Air Products (NYSE: APD) to report fiscal 2025 Q4 earnings on Nov 6, 2025, in a teleconference at 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled by Air Products (NYSE:APD) on November 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, to review the company's financial standings for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025. The call will be open for public and media listening, with no participation option.

data.title: Calgary's Questworld unveils a Not-So-Spooky Haunted House, Ancient Egypt–themed for families. Media Night on Oct 15.
data.description: A new attraction, the Not-So-Spooky Haunted House, with an Ancient Egypt theme, has been launched by Questworld in Calgary, Alberta. This family-friendly adventure is set to debut on Oct 15 with a special Media Night.
